prompt: Glossy 3D illustration of the colorful interior of an Argentine party supplies and cotillon store called Mundo Magico. Wide shelves packed floor-to-ceiling with balloons in every color, party hats, streamers, confetti bags, decorations, pinatas, and festive cotillon products. The store brand colors are bright green, royal blue, red, orange, and yellow. Warm magical festive lighting, celebratory atmosphere. Style: highly polished octane render, glossy 3D objects, soft warm cream background glow, photorealistic quality meets illustration. Wide 16:9 format. No people, just the beautiful abundant festive store interior full of color and joy. High quality, vibrant, inviting.
